textByHash.f3acfc25202e76b99ce046d4f41f487a214be30c: Welcome back adventurer! How is your cat?
textByHash.95dd4c2257eb60c4ab1557e06a896bf01f9e369f: What can I do for you then? I hope it's not about death runes. I heard a terrible rumour you know.
textByHash.3b368ebacfa3fc6fe747fcc7ef13f1f121dfa223: Why, are you going to talk in a stupid accent? Go on, try me.
textByHash.7801f7571c2525f954d31e3445606067b9ec15f2: Bob.... you mean the big tomcat who hangs around the Heroes' guild? No, I'm afraid I don't know a lot about him. People round here know I care for sick and abandoned animals, and one day I found a basket with
textByHash.7eb0fbebed5df1e9948a6c8c121d1b48c4e0716d: a kitten inside it left on my doorstep. I brought him up as best I could and he soon learnt to take care of himself. He really was an amazing little thing. There was this one time when.....
textByHash.ee78af42abb7810c814aabda18dd370eb0f4b3e6: Crumbs! Your cat's quite noisy isn't it? Is everything OK?
textByHash.f82b5e4bfc706805f908911bc11a27933ea44697: Oh was I... Oh yes, well, I'm afraid I don't know anything about them adventurer.
textByHash.84fa5dcc68f97899b7a96be2d8a7a1910150e8a6: No, sorry. If it's a legend, it's Reldo you need to talk to. He's in Varrock palace library, knows all about that kind of thing.
textByHash.954b7a72727b5b0a7b520f6c00c28dcbed400f8c: Greetings adventurer, have you spoken to Reldo in the palace library about Robert the Strong?
textByHash.cee2a49561f551b9241c81f0083fc828d2170a15: Do I look okay? Those kids drive me crazy.
textByHash.8dd80c8c295efe63b0769ffa5c8e3ba4d90e37de: I'm sorry. It's just that I've lost her.
textByHash.f2b207423b7ac99021db52109f233f0319fe0b52: Fluffs, poor Fluffs. She never hurt anyone.
textByHash.7352d4b4bca680f6ddc0994c5b54f4e649e691c0: My beloved feline friend Fluffs. She's been purring by my side for almost a decade. Please, could you go search for her while I look over the kids?
textByHash.b4c7770593dc50ef571809d338d6d6a4556536e5: Really? Thank you so much! I really have no idea where she could be!
textByHash.893d157d1ebbb11aa7c212d79b61a7bca3a47198: I think my sons, Shilop and Wilough, saw the cat last. They'll be out in the market place.
textByHash.9a3cde2fddeb323f0b80448b3e3852cc130a3aef: Well, okay then. I'll have to find someone else.
textByHash.d8bfa4c211eaf10657ebf54212fbe631203a2583: Have you seen my poor Fluffs?
textByHash.8bec6a6bf40abff49364c81430c7af696185683d: Hmmm...strange, he should be at the market.
textByHash.430c5d2220cd9b6085d696e9362f77d3104b366f: Hello again, did you manage to find Shilop? I can't keep an eye on him for the life of me.
textByHash.4a27dfdabad2954db514303ddc50cedf1585c574: You have no idea! Did he help at all?
textByHash.f8c84c90baaa6434734ba8dbbd3bfebcdaa3acbf: Hello. How's it going? Any luck?
textByHash.4bb283b0fe4a9d3a0e9e14ac49036e56745cd4af: Well well, you are clever! Did you bring her back?
textByHash.c4d568bb894002bbb8b83b0459c55f65d8dfc068: Oh dear, oh dear! Maybe she's just hungry. She loves doogle sardines but I'm all out.
textByHash.83db6244954619132266cac8546f456fb5e5f824: Yes, raw sardines seasoned with doogle leaves. Unfortunately I've used all my doogle leaves, but you may find some in the woods out back.
textByHash.33b5e5b139f2cfa678684bf72cdbc39ad4637068: Hey traveller, did Fluffs eat the sardines?
textByHash.6722ba97e6977734e64cb05dd64eba89127080e3: Well that is strange, there must be a reason.
textByHash.ddf77f30f8f2b02c5f569ff985ec91bf81187256: You're back! Thank you! Thank you! Fluffs just came back! I think she was just upset as she couldn't find her kitten.
textByHash.6c259e60fd1da0bce0dafe2544f8ddb3b6fb289a: If you hadn't found her kitten it would have died out there!
textByHash.dc5df9f3bbe410ef04025c42ab0a4903df72e345: I don't know how to thank you. I have no real material possessions. I do have kittens! I can only really look after one.
textByHash.ae68bd1c16343e3a634b3affba34036570dc440d: I would sell it to my cousin in West Ardougne. I hear there's a rat epidemic there. But it's too far.
textByHash.f57b9f15659671e5e047bc783abd5866663032a2: Here you go, look after her and thank you again!
textByHash.d94b42b6db284fcabfa85fdecdfb7ce3ca716c94: Oh by the way, the kitten can live in your backpack, but to make it grow you must take it out and feed and stroke it often.
textByHash.469221c35aa89df7b1bebad576b186e836f3ff18: Oh yes, before I forget - are you still in the adventuring business?
textByHash.bea5e9506cb56a9516e1903acae8fa2af5ff40c7: Well, I don't - but I happen to know someone who might!
textByHash.b854c2039d48fcaf7c4c831d650c0b76da10cdc3: Well, there are these two ladies who are looking for adventurers with cats.
textByHash.fdcb930100d94e3e5e52fb9800c6548240ef299d: They told me they generally hang about in the sewers below Varrock. I can't stand it down there, or I'd have looked into this ratcatching business myself.
textByHash.cf667e8b8df25ce49572b858391e62abf6a917d6: I've had to drag Shilop and Wilough out of there more times than I care to count, the little rascals.
textByHash.bc42b492135b4f4a31720e37f79a798b89898d1e: I don't know which is harder, raising kids or cats.
textByHash.e6abf9abddbbb6d5850cbd480e8a1675a9af077b: Very well. Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.ee0f42622f15d52819595bf1afcaa414b1c8da63: Oh yes, before I forget I think there are some people you should meet.
textByHash.66089429af2516e81cce2729d3aa4a54ab387768: Oh good. You can go and see them in the sewers whenever you're not too busy. Now, is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.791f96335bda17f915a86c43a668b7fa1a90f61b: Did you ever get to talk to those ratcatchers I told you about?
textByHash.bbf5c764af71d16c2635f444e18536d0b72bd743: Well, my dear. Is there anything I can do for you?
textByHash.b44f13b9976696fa504e74c461437b333cb2cee3: Indeed I have. They are 100 coins each, do you want one?
textByHash.1a9361d50e2a7516abd104faf0b6661b7634cca1: Well okay, but they're all just as cuddly as each other.
textByHash.b66ae0002735b3d1210185873cbd4a54271ad395: I'll want 100 coins for a kitten.
textByHash.5fbab83ca15c546d0523733a04b326c3dbb82881: Aren't you still raising that other kitten? Only once it's fully grown and it no longer needs your attention will I let you have another kitten.
textByHash.84dfbc2e09e10f571df631d93b0a4c312eb91403: Well, hello adventurer! How are you?
textByHash.d7e8228aa9ceaa487646d57e9781e8f9c85433e4: Well well! You are good with cats! I'd give you a little present if you had space to take it.
textByHash.4bccc5149ffa49c96c0c4024bf15960115ad7e40: Well well! You are good with cats!
textByHash.5b477a4198bb9921f0914d6585a79a080b91c783: Here, I have a little present for you...
textByHash.0200939090e8024fc4008ff1a08a7762284b7e07: Oh, I do love my precious little kittens! Perhaps you could care for one, some day!
